title: phlegmariurus josesantae
intro: Phlegmariurus josesantae, also known as the Josesantae whisk fern or Phlegmariurus whisk fern, is a species of plant in the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a type of club moss that has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phlegmariurus josesantae include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
